title: Maintain tracker for companion UI task
summary: Own the tracker-only changes required to initiate and maintain the companion UI workflow task, including the project task index, cross-task context snapshots, and validation linkage.
acceptance_criteria: the companion UI workflow task is created from the operator-approved draft
the project task index lists both the tracker-maintenance owner and the companion UI task
every project task context snapshot includes all non-done task JSON files required by the validator
tracker-only edits remain linked to this non-done tracker-maintenance task
the standalone workflow-search-catalog product remains outside tracker-maintenance write scope
workflow state validation passes after tracker updates

context_snapshot.summary: Load the full real-life-workflows tracker and stopped testing-session summary before maintaining task state for the companion UI workflow.

session_log.event: Initiated with operator approval after validation proved a non-done tracker-maintenance owner is required before creating the companion UI workflow task.
Continued into tracker implementation to create real-life-workflows-006 and refresh every project task snapshot with both non-done task paths.
Updated real-life-workflows-006 from intake to planning after loading its search contract, linked finder artifacts, count proof, standalone product guidance, and current 171-row index model.
Recorded the first UI planning decision in real-life-workflows-006: the experience is search-first and progressively reflects searches performed through the CLI or agentic search surface.
Recorded the next UI planning direction in real-life-workflows-006: automatic Search History and a visible Activity Log are distinct product concepts, while log depth remains unresolved.
Recorded the Activity Log boundary and local-first persistence decision in real-life-workflows-006; the concrete storage engine remains unresolved.
Recorded the non-blank, capability-led opening-state direction in real-life-workflows-006 and deferred the SQLite versus JSON/JSONL decision.
Recorded the operator's correction in real-life-workflows-006: chat is the working surface, search is the primary chat intent, and the UI is a reflection of chat and agent activity.

next_action: Finish implementation and validate the result.
